name: Bug report / wrong match
about: A crash, a sequence-drift halt, or a record matched to the wrong release

labels: bug

<!-- The per-album console line(s), e.g.:
     ✗ ERR  Artist — Title  …
     ◉ COVER Artist — Title [r123] cover match   (but it's the wrong pressing) -->

**Expected**
<!-- What release/pressing it should have matched, ideally a Discogs URL. -->

<!-- Paste the relevant row(s) from results.csv / review.csv if you can.
     ⚠️ Do NOT attach your photos — they carry EXIF GPS / personal data. -->

- discogser version / commit:
- Python version:
- OS:
- HEIC photos? (did you install the `heic` extra?)
